titleStmt.title: SII 24.329: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 329. (A.R. No. 7 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers the gift of two villages Koḍiyālam in Teṉkarai-Rājagambhīravaḷanāḍu and Śiṟudavūr (Kīḻaimuṟi) in Maḻa-nāḍu in Vaḍakarai Rājarājavaḷanāḍu by Aṇṇa Chavuṇḍappagaḷ, son of Ādityadēva-Uḍaiyar to Uttama-Nambi, the officer-in charge of the temple, towards garlands, daily offerings and a perpetual lamp to god Raṅganātha and for the celebration of a car festival in the month of Puraṭṭāśi on the day of Uttirāḍam, the natal star of Ādityadēva-Uḍaiyar. An elephant for service during the festival and 30 cows for the lamp were also given. The details of the date viz., Śaka 1355, Pramādī, Makara ba. 6, Friday, Hasta correspond to A.D. 1434, January 1, Friday; ·22; ·70.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
—śrīmanmahāmaṇḍala pratāpadevarāya mahārāyar pṛdhivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakāptam 100 3 10 55ṉ mel cellāniṉṟapramādi samvatsarattu makaranāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu ṣaṣṭiyum śukravāramum peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ perumāḷ śrīraṅganātha[ devar] śrībhaṇḍārattukku kaṭavauttamanampikku Ādityadevakaḷ makaṉār Aṇṇa cavuṇṭappakaḷ rmaśāsanappaṭṭayam vasiṣṭhagotrattu Āśvalāyanasūtra rasar makaṉār Eṅka devauṭaiyar perāle perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevaṟku Oru Avasarattukku Añcu taḷikai ghṛtagu ḷacaṟkarai sahitamākavum tiruppaṇi maṭaṅkukiṟa kālattile campāttaḷikaiyāka Oru taḷikaiyum Āṟuappamum
Amutu ceyyumpaṭikkumtiruttoppu Īraṇait tirumālai Oru tirunantāviḷakkum puraṭṭāti māsattile Ādityadevauṭaiyar janmanakṣatramāṉa Uttirāṭattile tirutterum tirtthammākat tirunāḷ naṭakkumpaṭikkum dhārāpūrvamākak kuṭutta teṉkarai Irācakempiravaḷanāṭṭuk koṭiyālam Ūr Oṉṟu vaṭakarai Irācarāca vaḷanāṭṭu maḻanāṭu kiḻaimuṟi ciṟutavūr Ūr Oṉṟum Āka Ūr Iraṇṭum tiruviḷakku Eṉṟu Eṉṟaikkum naṭakkakkuṭutta pacu Uru muppatum Ādityadeva- Uṭaiyar perāle naṭakkiṟa tirunāḷukku sevikkak kuṭutta Āṉai Oṉṟum Āka Ivai candrādityavaraiyum Aṉupavittu
kkoṇṭu Inta Avasaramum tirunāḷum tiruttoppum tirumālaiyum tiruṉantāviḷakkum candrādityavaraiyum naṭakkakkaṭavarkaḷākavum § svadattām parada ttāmvā yo hareta vasundharām .ṣaṣṭim varuṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyā- ñjāyate kṛmiḥ . dānapālanayormmaddhye dānāt ccre yonupālanam dānāt svargamavāpnoti pālanādaccutam padam ..śubhamastu .§
Digital edition of SII 24.329 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
